user.title: Connect to HA aux Add-on
user.description: Enter the URL of the HA aux add-on API and a name for the media player.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered HA aux Add-on
discovery_confirm.description: The HA aux audio renderer add-on was found on your system at {device_name}. Do you want to add it?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the HA aux add-on. Make sure it is installed and running.

abort.already_configured: This HA aux add-on is already configured.
